_meta.source: Google Sheet '[@] AI assistant index' / tab 'Assistant Index 📖'

kinds.standalone: Create new skills/{N-cat}/{project}/SKILL.md (or backfill sheetId if already exists)
kinds.drop: Sheet says do not migrate (Migrate=Drop). Skip permanently.
kinds.skip: Not actionable today (Not started / WIP / Pause / Out dated). Re-evaluate when sheet status flips to Done.

_meta.id_policy: REVERSED 2026-06-09: the authored frontmatter sheetId IS the canonical content id (ingest.ts precedence-0). FIFO assignment only applies to sheetId-less stubs. Old FIFO ids redirect via generated/id-redirects.json.

0.01.sheet_name: 行政助理 ─ 搜尋助理索引

0.01.notes: Resolved 2026-05-25: neither strategy nor operations fits — this is a marketplace discovery agent (end-user finds the right assistant). Placed in 5-product (GTM / marketplace management function). Hand-authored from sheet description, not synced via tmp/docs.
